articles.title: US lawmaker warns Trump to ‘stop the war’ as Iran's deadly revenge strikes target American forces?
articles.description: US Representative Ro Khanna has accused President Donald Trump of violating the War Powers Resolution after fresh American strikes linked to Iran, warning that legal action could follow if the conflict continues. Khanna’s remarks frame the issue as both a constitutional clash in Washington and a growing political challenge to Trump’s handling of the crisis.

articles.title: Intense rain and heat wave threat at once: IMD issues fresh weather warning for multiple states; what travellers need to know
articles.description: India braces for a mixed weather outlook as the southwest monsoon advances, bringing heavy to very heavy rainfall to northeastern states, Sub-Himalayan West Bengal, Sikkim, and parts of central and western India. Meanwhile, isolated pockets in Bihar, Haryana, Delhi, and Uttar Pradesh continue to grapple with severe heat wave conditions. Residents are advised to stay vigilant due to potential waterlogging and flash floods. India weather update, Southwest monsoon 2026, IMD heavy rainfall warning, Heat wave and thunderstorms India, Monsoon travel advisory India

articles.title: Passive investing explosion: DSP’s Anil Ghelani predicts ETFs, index funds will command 30% of mutual fund industry
articles.description: Passive investing is gaining rapid traction in India, with DSPs Anil Ghelani projecting ETFs and index funds to grow from 17% to 30% of mutual fund assets within five years. The shift reflects changing investor behaviour, with passive strategies forming core portfolios and active funds playing a selective, high-alpha role.

Inside Turkey's Crackdown on Dissent Ahead of NATO Summit
articles.description: Turkey has detained more than three dozen elderly environmental volunteers and over 200 others in security sweeps ahead of next month's NATO summit.
